changes_made: Changed k8s_audit_logging_enabled to k8s_apiserver_audit_logging_enabled for consistency with resource naming
review_notes: The functions map well to the PCI DSS control 10.5.1, focusing on audit log integrity and availability. The naming convention mostly follows the pattern, but 'k8s_audit_logging_enabled' should specify the resource 'apiserver' for clarity and consistency with existing patterns.
naming_improvements: Use 'apiserver' as the resource prefix for audit logging functions to align with existing naming conventions
title: Requirement 10.5.1
step1_reasoning: The PCI DSS control 10.5.1 focuses on ensuring the integrity and availability of audit logs. In Kubernetes, this maps to ensuring that audit logging is enabled, logs are retained for a sufficient period, the audit policy captures necessary metadata, and log integrity is maintained. These checks ensure that Kubernetes audit logs are properly configured to meet compliance requirements similar to those in cloud environments.
